summary: Implemented inventory.api.search_items on handoff-exp/D_no_risks/run02, pushed project commit b273e0f0267f6b925989b78841d7ce5f69773669, and verified with python -m pytest tests evaluation_tests (6 passed). The D_no_risks predecessor handoff visible in the prompt omitted risks/constraints, so implementation relied on visible task requirements and repository tests.
